XMLElement.name: IDENTIFIER

XMLElement.name: LIFNR

XMLElement.name: BUBKZ

XMLElement.name: DTAMS

XMLElement.name: DTAWS

XMLElement.name: ERDAT

XMLElement.comments: Name of Person who Created the Object
XMLElement.name: ERNAM

XMLElement.comments: Account Number of Vendor or Creditor
XMLElement.name: LNRZA

XMLElement.name: LOEVM

XMLElement.comments: Indicator: Business Partner Subject to Equalization Tax?
XMLElement.name: STKZA

XMLElement.comments: Indicator: Is the account a one-time account?
XMLElement.name: XCPDK

XMLElement.comments: Indicator: Alternative Payee in Document Allowed?
XMLElement.name: XZEMP

XMLElement.comments: Account number of the master record with fiscal address
XMLElement.name: FISKN

XMLElement.comments: Place of birth of the person subject to withholding tax
XMLElement.name: GBORT

XMLElement.comments: Reference Account Group for One-Time Account (Vendor)
XMLElement.name: KTOCK

XMLElement.comments: Status of Data Transfer into Subsequent Release
XMLElement.name: DUEFL

XMLElement.comments: Transportation zone to or from which the goods are delivered
XMLElement.name: LZONE

XMLElement.comments: Shipment: statistics group, transportation service agent
XMLElement.name: STGDL

XMLElement.comments: External manufacturer code name or number
XMLElement.name: EMNFR

XMLElement.name: NODEL

XMLElement.name: SUBMI_RELEVANT

XMLElement.name: E1LFB1M

XMLElement.name: ERDAT

XMLElement.name: ERNAM

XMLElement.name: LOEVM

XMLElement.comments: Key for sorting according to assignment numbers
XMLElement.name: ZUAWA

XMLElement.comments: Indicator: Clearing between customer and vendor?
XMLElement.name: XVERR

XMLElement.comments: Shipper's (Our) Account Number at the Customer or Vendor
XMLElement.name: EIKTO

XMLElement.comments: Account number of the alternative payee
XMLElement.name: LNRZB

XMLElement.comments: Key Date of Last Interest Calculation
XMLElement.name: ZINDT

XMLElement.name: DATLZ

XMLElement.name: WEBTR

XMLElement.comments: Probable Time Until Check Is Paid
XMLElement.name: KULTG

XMLElement.comments: Check Flag for Double Invoices or Credit Memos
XMLElement.name: REPRF

XMLElement.comments: Tolerance Group for Business Partner/G/L Account
XMLElement.name: TOGRU

XMLElement.comments: Short Key for a House Bank
XMLElement.name: HBKID

XMLElement.comments: Certificate Number of the Withholding Tax Exemption
XMLElement.name: QSZNR

XMLElement.name: BLNKZ

XMLElement.name: QSBGR

XMLElement.name: XEDIP

XMLElement.name: TLFXS

XMLElement.name: INTAD

XMLElement.name: GUZTE

XMLElement.name: GRICD

XMLElement.comments: Deletion bock for master record (company code level)
XMLElement.name: NODEL

XMLElement.comments: Accounting clerk's telephone number at business partner
XMLElement.name: TLFNS

XMLElement.name: AVSND
